_meta.description: ETS extraction templates v1.3.0. Each template defines how to detect an email type and what fields to extract. Templates are matched in priority order (highest first). Tags apply weighted category scores to each email; snippet policy is derived from final tag scores.
_meta.agent_instructions:
To add a new extractor template, use the ets_add_extractor tool or append an entry to templates[] following the schema below. Required fields: id (unique snake_case), name, priority, type, detect, extract, tags.

--- TAGS ---
tags is an object with weighted scores (0.0–1.0) for any of: action_required, personal, financial, investment, job, kids, travel, marketing, social, newsletter. Only include categories relevant to this template type — others default to 0.0. The cross-cutting tag_rules array applies additional score adjustments based on subject/snippet regex matching (using max() merge), so your base tags only need to capture what is unconditionally true for this template type.

Snippet policy (applied automatically from final tag scores after tag_rules merge):
  full snippet:  action_required >= 0.6 OR personal >= 0.7
  100 chars:     action_required >= 0.3 OR personal >= 0.4 OR investment >= 0.7
  omitted:       everything else (tags + extracted fields only — no snippet tokens)

--- PRIORITY GUIDE ---
  >= 110  Specific sender domain + specific subject regex (UPS shipping, Amazon orders)
  100–109 Site-specific: any email from a known sender domain
  75–99   High-confidence generic type (financial alerts, job emails, calendar invites)
  50–74   Broad generic type (generic shipping, billing, order confirms)
  < 50    Fallback / catch-all patterns

--- DETECT ---
At least one rule required: sender_domain (exact), sender_contains (substring), subject_regex, snippet_regex. All must match unless 'any: true'.

--- EXTRACT ---
Each field uses one of: static (fixed value), regex (returns capture group 1), enum_map ({pattern: value}, first match wins), or max_chars alone (truncates source text). Source can be a string or array tried in order: 'subject', 'snippet', 'sender', 'from_name'.

--- EXAMPLE: Etsy order template ---
{
  "id": "etsy-order",
  "name": "Etsy Order Confirmation",
  "priority": 105,
  "type": "order_confirm",
  "detect": {
    "sender_domain": "etsy.com",
    "subject_regex": "(?i)(order confirmed|you bought|receipt)"
  },
  "tags": {"marketing": 0.1, "financial": 0.3, "action_required": 0.0},
  "extract": {
    "order_number": {"source": ["subject", "snippet"], "regex": "#(\\d{8,})"},
    "total": {"source": "snippet", "regex": "\\$[\\d,]+\\.?\\d*"},
    "shop": {"source": "snippet", "regex": "(?:from|shop:)\\s+([A-Za-z0-9 ]{2,40})"},
    "item_hint": {"source": "snippet", "max_chars": 80}
  }
}

_tag_schema.description: Tag categories applied to every email. Values 0.0-1.0.

categories.action_required: Needs the user to take action
categories.newsletter: Informational digest with no action needed

snippet_policy.omit: everything else — tags only, no snippet

match.subject_regex: (?i)(commented on|mentioned you|replied to|liked your|followed you|friend request|connection request|message from)
(?i)(low balance|balance alert|spending alert|large (transaction|purchase)|charge of \$|transaction alert|credit card statement)
(?i)(your (order|delivery) (is|has been)|on its way|driver (is|has)|food delivery|doordash|uber eats|grubhub|instacart|your dasher)
(?i)(application (received|submitted|under review|status|update)|applied to|your resume|job alert|new job|job match|hiring (manager|team))
(?i)(this week|last week|recap|highlights|summary|what.s new|what to (know|watch)|in case you missed|trending (now|today|this week))
(?i)(data breach|security breach|information (exposed|compromised)|your (data|information) (may have been|was|has been) (exposed|compromised|accessed)|credit monitoring)
(?i)(linkedin|inmail|connection (request|accepted)|who viewed your profile|job (alert|recommendation|match)|people you may know)

detect.subject_regex: (?i)(invited you to|invitation:|calendar invite|you.re invited|save the date)

event_name.regex: (?:invitation:|invited you to|you.re invited to|save the date:?)\s*(.+)

detect.subject_regex: (?i)(offer letter|interview (invitation|request|scheduled|confirmed)|we.d like to (speak|connect|discuss|interview)|application (moved forward|status update|decision|next steps)|recruiter (outreach|message)|exciting (opportunity|role|position))
(?i)(has shipped|out for delivery|order delivered|your package|delivery update|shipment (update|confirmation)|delivered today|arriving today|arriving tomorrow|expected delivery|in transit)
(?i)(order (confirmed|received|placed|#\d+)|thank you for (your order|your purchase)|your receipt from|purchase confirmation)
(?i)(bill|invoice|statement|payment due|amount due|balance due|your (bill|invoice|statement) is ready|new statement)
(?i)(order (confirmed|received|placed)|your receipt|invoice from apple|thank you for your (order|purchase))
(?i)(order confirmed|you bought|receipt from|thank you for your (order|purchase))

templates.name: Apple Receipt (App Store / iCloud / Apple One)

detect.subject_regex: (?i)(your receipt from apple|invoice from apple|app store receipt|icloud storage|apple one|apple tv|apple music|apple arcade)

(?i)(subscription (renewed|has been renewed|successfully renewed|renewal complete)|payment (processed|received|confirmed|successful)|your (subscription|membership|plan) has (been renewed|renewed|been charged))
(?i)(check.in (is )?now open|time to check in|online check.in|check in for your flight|check in (reminder|available))
(?i)(connection (request|accepted)|message|inmail|who viewed|job (alert|match|recommendation)|new opportunity|people you may know|congratulate|profile view|endorsement)
(?i)(job alert|new jobs?|application (update|status|received|viewed)|interview|your resume|jobs? matching|apply now|job match)
(?i)(password (reset|change|changed|update)|reset your password|change your password|forgot (your )?password|(you|someone) requested a password reset)
(?i)(verify (your|your email|account|email address)|email verification|confirm (your|your email)|activate (your|your account)|complete (your|sign.up|registration|your account))

(?i)(data breach|security breach|information (exposed|compromised|accessed)|your (data|personal information|account) (may have been|was|has been) (exposed|compromised|accessed|involved)|security (incident|notice)|credit monitoring)

(?i)(\d+% off|up to \d+% off|sale|flash sale|deal|limited time (offer|deal|sale)|clearance|promo(tion)?|coupon|discount|save (up to|\d+)|shop (now|today|our)|don.t miss out|exclusive offer|members? only|new arrivals?|just dropped|back in stock|free shipping)
